step_rationale: P2X1 is a fast ATP-gated ion channel on platelets mediating rapid shape change and activation.
mechanism: P2X1 receptor mediates ATP-dependent rapid platelet activation and calcium influx during thrombus formation.

references.title: Abacavir causes leukocyte/platelet crosstalk by activating neutrophil P2X7 receptors thus releasing soluble lectin-like oxidized low-density lipoprotein receptor-1.
